_meta.usage: Load when: evaluating starter relics, checking relic rewards

relics.name: Burning Blood
relics.description: At the end of combat, heal 6 HP.
relics.flavor_text: Your body's own blood burns with an undying rage.

relics.name: Cracked Core
relics.description: At the start of each combat, Channel 1 Lightning.
relics.flavor_text: The mysterious life force which powers the Automatons within the Spire. It appears to be cracked.

relics.name: Pure Water
relics.description: At the start of each combat, add a Miracle into your hand.
relics.flavor_text: Filtered through fine sand and free of impurities.

relics.name: Ring of the Snake
relics.description: At the start of each combat, draw 2 additional cards.
relics.flavor_text: Made from a fossilized snake. Represents great skill as a huntress.
